title: [CI] [ExportVerilog]
body:
Seems like the ExportVerilog pass is producing incorrect Verilog: https://github.com/llvm/circt/runs/3805588305?check_suite_focus=true

```
********************
Testing:  0.. 10.. 20.. 30.. 40.. 50.. 60.
FAIL: CIRCT :: EmitVerilog/basic.mlir (20 of 28)
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: EmitVerilog/basic.mlir' FAILED ********************
Script:
--
: 'RUN: at line 2';   /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-opt /__w/circt/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/basic.mlir -export-verilog -verify-diagnostics > /__w/circt/circt/build/tools/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/Output/basic.mlir.tmp1.sv
: 'RUN: at line 3';   /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-rtl-sim.py /__w/circt/circt/build/tools/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/Output/basic.mlir.tmp1.sv --cycles 8 2>&1 | /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /__w/circt/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/basic.mlir
--
Exit Code: 1

// CHECK: [driver] Starting simulation

^
<stdin>:4:149: note: possible intended match here
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: /__w/circt/circt/build/tools/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/Output/basic.mlir.tmp1.sv:35:17: Unsupported: Verilog 2001-config reserved word not implemented: 'instance'
                                                                                                                                                    ^

Input file: <stdin>
Check file: /__w/circt/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/basic.mlir

-dump-input=help explains the following input dump.

check:27'0     X~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ error: no match found

check:27'0     ~~~~~

check:27'0     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
check:27'1                                                                                                                                                         ?                                            possible intended match
            5:  35 | %aaa.f = hw.instance "aaa" @AAA() -> (f: i1) 
check:27'0     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
            6:  | ^~~~~~~~ 
check:27'0     ~~~~~~~~~~~~
            7: %Error-UNSUPPORTED: /__w/circt/circt/build/tools/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/Output/basic.mlir.tmp1.sv:38:17: Unsupported: Verilog 2001-config reserved word not implemented: 'instance' 
check:27'0     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
